title: geo.bbox
description: Locations inside a lat/lon rectangle (map viewport). min_lon > max_lon means the box crosses the antimeridian (the lon range wraps through ±180°). Returns {"results": [{uuid, name, country, geohash, distance_km: null}, ...]}. Served by the configured search backend (STAPEL_GEO["SEARCH_BACKEND"]).

min_lon.description: Western edge (may exceed max_lon across the antimeridian).
